detail.rule: messages.text is embedded verbatim, sliced to maxContentChars. messages.text includes fenced code blocks inline (the importer re-wraps code parts in ``` fences), so code content IS embedded up to the char cap. No chunking: one embedding per message, head-truncation only.

population.note: code_chars from sum(length(code_blocks.code)) per message; ratio = code_chars / length(messages.text)
